implementedReadOnlyNotes.client: list + plan + config-writing install are implemented; export stays preview-only for blocked/public lanes until config-writing support expands
implementedReadOnlyNotes.lab: fixture inventory, readiness matrix, gap report, and scenario drill-down
implementedReadOnlyNotes.init: bootstrap only; seeds local state layout and reports readiness
implementedReadOnlyNotes.hub: local lifecycle/state/log/repair plus file-backed runtime lease acquire/renew/release/list surface; live upstream MCP forwarding still pending
implementedReadOnlyNotes.stdio-shim: bootstrap-only proof surface; normalizes context and ensures hub up but does not forward live MCP stdio traffic
implementedReadOnlyNotes.dashboard: local browser control surface over native JSON read paths and safe lifecycle actions
implementedReadOnlyNotes.setup: one-command local bootstrap that starts serve, installs supported local client config entries, verifies readiness, and smokes /healthz plus /mcp
implementedReadOnlyNotes.service: user-level autostart install/status/uninstall/print via the auto-launch crate; uses the current executable path instead of requiring mcpace in PATH
implementedReadOnlyNotes.serve: public one-port localhost HTTP surface with start/stop/status lifecycle commands
implementedReadOnlyNotes.mcp-server: internal MCP compatibility surface for stdio bootstrap and fallback flows
implementedReadOnlyNotes.update: safe update-check guidance only; reports package-manager commands and never self-updates the running binary
